SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-14-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-14-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT HELDER MATAMOROS RAMIREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-14-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, HELDER MATAMOROS $1,006.65 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,086.65 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
